patches.summary: Enforce https-only base URLs (loopback-http exempt), delete Authorization on https->http redirect downgrades, owner-only permissions (0700/0600) for the HTTP cache, SQLite store, and --deliver dirs, and redact credential-shaped strings from APIError bodies at construction.
patches.reason: Production security audit ahead of the first public release; cached bodies and synced rows carry customer PII and payment data.

patches.summary: Replace the generator's placeholder credential URL (run.pstmn.io) with https://dashboard.straddle.com and link the authentication docs from auth setup.
patches.reason: The generated auth_key_url was a broken placeholder; users need the real dashboard and docs.

patches.summary: Replace the hardcoded version constant with Version(): GoReleaser ldflags, then module build info, then dev.
patches.reason: Release builds and go install module@vX must report their real version.

patches.summary: Rename the Go module from straddle-pp-cli to github.com/straddle-build/cli and rewrite all import paths.
patches.reason: go install requires a resolvable module path.

patches.summary: Delete the embedded MCP server (cmd/straddle-pp-mcp, internal/mcp, manifest.json) and the mcp-go dependency; inert mcp:* Cobra annotations stay for agent-context.
patches.reason: This repo ships the CLI only; a standalone MCP server will live in its own repo. Removed at commit 'Remove embedded MCP server' for recoverability.

patches.summary: Rename the shipped binary and all user-facing strings/paths from straddle-pp-cli to straddle; generated headers drop DO NOT EDIT (repo is maintained directly).
patches.reason: Production name for the first public release; provenance files keep the original name verbatim.
